summary: Post-refactor regression testing completed. Backend: 44/44 tests passed (100%). Fixed 3 bugs in refactored code (date handling in fiscal.py and reportes.py). Frontend: All pages load correctly, navigation works, login/dashboard functional.

issues: Recharts console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'isoformat' in create_obligacion
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added check for string vs datetime before calling isoformat()

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'isoformat' in generate_report_data and create_report
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added check for string vs datetime before calling isoformat() and strftime()

passed_tests: POST /api/donativos - Create donation with valid donante
frontend_tests_passed: Landing page loads with 'Comenzar Ahora' and 'Iniciar Sesión' buttons
Login page loads with email/password form
Dashboard loads with stats (donantes, donativos, CFDIs, gastos admin)
Navigation to Alertas AML page works
Navigation to Catálogo SAT page works
critical_code_review_comments: The refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular routers was successful
services.py correctly extracts shared business logic (check_alert_rules, trigger_workflows)
All route modules properly import from database.py, models.py, and utils.py
Date handling in Pydantic models needs attention - some endpoints receive strings instead of datetime objects
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed donantes during CRUD tests (cleaned up after). Catalog auto-seeds 134 donatarias.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 was a POST-REFACTOR regression test after the monolithic server.py was split into modular routers under /app/backend/routes/. All 44 backend tests pass. Fixed 3 bugs related to date handling (isoformat on strings). Frontend fully functional. CFDI timbrado is MOCKED. Email notifications are MOCKED (RESEND_API_KEY not configured).

mocked_apis.CFDI_PAC_Integration: CFDI timbrado (stamping) is MOCKED - returns simulated UUID
mocked_apis.Email_Notifications: Email notifications MOCKED - RESEND_API_KEY not configured
